summary: Final responsive verification PASSED for the topbar/header action-row overflow fixes on /dashboard and /orders. At 390x844 mobile viewport (admin login admin@maestroegp.com/admin123), document.body.scrollWidth == window.innerWidth == 390 on BOTH /dashboard and /orders (delta=0). No non-background element exceeds innerWidth+2. The previously-offending action groups now have class 'flex flex-wrap items-center justify-end gap-2 sm:gap-3' and wrap correctly: dashboard action group renders at 342px wide x 120px tall (~3 rows), orders action group at 342px x 86px (~2 rows). Desktop 1920x1080 regression check: /dashboard sticky header is 81px tall with action row at w=961 h=36 (single line); /orders top header row h=48 (single line). Screenshots confirm titles on the right (RTL) and action buttons in a single row on the left/right edge on desktop as expected. No regression detected.
critical_code_review_comments: Suggestion (non-blocking): The pattern of right-side action rows now appears in multiple pages (Dashboard, Orders, and likely POS/Reports). Consider extracting a shared <TopbarActions> component that already encapsulates 'flex flex-wrap items-center justify-end gap-2 sm:gap-3' so future pages do not regress to the old non-wrapping pattern that required iterations 233-235 to find.

Suggestion (non-blocking): On dashboard mobile the wrapped action group is 120px tall (3 rows), which pushes hero content down ~213px from the top of the sticky header. If vertical space becomes an issue on small screens, consider collapsing seldom-used buttons (الخلفيات / قائمة العملاء / إغلاق الصندوق / الوردية) into a 'More' (•••) dropdown on <sm breakpoints instead of wrapping.
test_credentials: admin@maestroegp.com / admin123 (works; redirects to / which renders the Dashboard)
context_for_next_testing_agent: The mobile-overflow regression on /dashboard and /orders topbar action rows is fully resolved as of iteration 236. Measurement protocol: after admin login the app lands on '/', which IS the dashboard (no explicit /dashboard route — page.url shows '/'). SplashScreen ~13-15s post-login, ~10s on navigation. The action rows are now `flex flex-wrap items-center justify-end gap-2 sm:gap-3` and parent is `max-w-7xl mx-auto flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-3`. If future iterations add new buttons to these rows they should still wrap; just keep flex-wrap on both parent and child rows.
rca of the issue: Original RCA (iter 235): nested flex row with whitespace-nowrap children + default min-width:auto prevented flex-shrink → row grew to ~924px on /dashboard and ~413px on /orders even though parent was 342px, expanding body.scrollWidth. Fix applied (iter 236 source): added `flex-wrap` to both the outer max-w-7xl flex container and the inner action group. Verified: at 390 viewport the action row now wraps to multiple lines (h=120 on dashboard, h=86 on orders) and scrollWidth equals innerWidth. Desktop behavior unaffected since flex-wrap only wraps when items can't fit — at 1920px width the 961px action row stays single-line (h=36).
